en: If your company is required to comply with Peru's Supplementary Occupational Risk Insurance (SCTR) and maintain valid documentation, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).
Peru Statutory Labor Insurance Applicability Assessment

Supplementary Occupational Risk Insurance (SCTR) is the insurance that provides coverage to workers who, as a result of their high-risk work, suffer an accident at work or an occupational disease. The high-risk activities that are covered by the Supplementary High-Risk Work Insurance + Protection are detailed in Annex 5 of the Regulations of Law No. 26790, Law on the Modernization of Social Security in Health, approved by Supreme Decree No. 009-97-SA and its amendments. EsSalud/ONP
Is your company required to comply with Peru's Supplementary Occupational Risk Insurance (SCTR) as established by the Social Security Health Modernization Law No. 26790?
Please refer to Annex 5 of the Regulations of Law No. 26790 for the defined list of high-risk activities.
Please select from the following reasons your company is exempt from complying with Peru's Supplementary Occupational Risk Insurance (SCTR).
The company does not carry out high-risk activities listed in Annex 5 of D.S. 009‑97‑SA .
The company does not operate in or have employees in Peru.
Please explain why your company is exempt from complying with Peru's Supplementary Occupational Risk Insurance (SCTR).
